items.title: NFC North: QB buzz, plus underrated, surprising roster moves
items.body_text: The Bears, Packers, Lions and Vikings finished with winning records in 2025. Here's how their offseasons have impacted the NFC North.
items.author: NFL Nation

items.title: Sources: Stafford lands 1-year, $55M extension
items.body_text: Reigning NFL MVP Matthew Stafford and the Rams reached agreement on a one-year, $55 million extension, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter. The QB is now tied to L.A. through the 2027 season, with $105 million remaining on his deal.
items.author: Adam Schefter

items.title: Source: Giants DL Robertson-Harris tears Achilles
items.body_text: Giants defensive lineman Roy Robertson-Harris tore his Achilles at Thursday's OTA workout and is expected to miss the 2026 season, a source told ESPN.
items.author: Jordan Raanan

items.title: Source: Brissett, Cardinals not close on new deal
items.body_text: A reworked deal between the Arizona Cardinals and quarterback Jacoby Brissett is still not close, a source told ESPN on Friday.
items.author: Josh Weinfuss

items.title: Florida signs 'Teddy Bridgewater Act' into law
items.body_text: Florida signed the "Teddy Bridgewater Act" into law on Friday, meaning high school coaches in the state will now be able to use their own money to help their players with expenses such as food, transportation, physical therapy and rehabilitation services.

items.title: Source: Giants give GM Schoen multiyear deal
items.body_text: The Giants and general manager Joe Schoen agreed to terms on a multiyear extension.
items.author: Jordan Raanan

items.title: Lions ink All-Pro LB Campbell to 4-year extension
items.body_text: The Lions have signed Jack Campbell to a four-year extension, putting him under contract with the franchise through the 2030 season. The deal is for $81 million and includes $51.5M guaranteed, sources told NFL Network's Ian Rapoport.

items.title: Harbaugh: Giants unsure when Nabers will return
items.body_text: The Giants don't know when star wide receiver Malik Nabers will be back from what coach John Harbaugh said Thursday was "not a simple knee" injury.
items.author: Jordan Raanan

items.title: Bears say Chicago stadium options 'exhausted'
items.body_text: The Bears reiterated Thursday that they plan to leave Chicago as they continue to look at building a stadium in suburban Illinois or Hammond, Indiana.

items.title: ❤️ A.J. Brown gets married in oceanfront wedding
items.body_text: The star Eagles wide receiver became a husband over the weekend at Montage Laguna Beach in California.
items.author: Kalan Hooks

items.title: 'It's about building trust': QB Malik Willis focus...
items.body_text: Willis signed a three-year, $67.5 million contract this offseason because the Dolphins believe he can be their franchise quarterback.
items.author: Marcel Louis-Jacques

items.title: Brian Burns doing it all for his nephew, autism awareness
items.body_text: Giants defensive veteran Brian Burns' success has opened doors for him to show his true purpose.
items.author: Jordan Raanan

items.title: The best, worst offseason moves of the AFC: Barnwe...
items.body_text: The Steelers signing Jamel Dean? Solid move. The Colts guaranteeing big money to Daniel Jones? Not so much. Let's pick out offseason highs and lows in the AFC.
items.author: Bill Barnwell

items.title: A welcome-to-the-NFL moment in the third grade? Co...
items.body_text: As Carlie Irsay-Gordon emerges from her father's shadow, criticism becomes a bigger part of the job, but she's prepared.
items.author: Stephen Holder

items.body_text: Some owners helped land franchise QBs, while others -- like Jimmy Haslam -- were less fortunate.

items.title: Former Commanders owner's home returns to market -...
items.body_text: Nearly 3 years after Dan Snyder sold the Commanders, his former home was put back on the market.
items.author: John Keim

items.title: Can the Steelers win with a 42-year-old quarterbac...
items.body_text: Does Rodgers have anything left? Will the Steelers' offense look the same as it did in 2025? And can running it back actually work for Pittsburgh?

items.title: Super Bowl 2027 on ESPN: Date, location, venue, more details
items.body_text: The 2027 Super Bowl will air on ESPN for the first time in network history. Learn more information about Super Bowl LXI festivities now.
